generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder measuring hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data stored in TimescaleDB database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData, WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB, Grafana
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model created in Autodesk Fusion360 for gantry crane structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization platform for service deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, TrajectorySimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data visualization tool for dashboard creation"
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for sensor data transmission"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, TrajectorySimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Repository hosting for version control"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService, TrajectorySimulationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrajectoryOptimizationInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight
]

instance TrajectorySimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation service for trajectory simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using time series classification techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, NotifyOperatorsAction
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time fault detection insights from time series classification"
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Trajectory optimization results for optimal path planning"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data visualization insights from Grafana dashboard"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation insights from comparing real-time measurements with simulations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for trajectory simulation"
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data logging status and metrics"
]

instance NotifyOperatorsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator notification via dashboard for threshold breaches"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist motion"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for picking up containers"
]

instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for container movement"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotor, HoistMotor, Electromagnet
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service sent via the Control Application to physical crane motors to execute optimal trajectories."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous real-time synchronization with data logging and validation occurring at operational frequencies; specific sampling rates not detailed in document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical crane components (motors, sensors), Python applications (Control, Logging, HMI), digital twin services (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation), and containerized database, dashboard, and MQTT broker, interconnected via MQTT."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers designed phase (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and operated phase (continuous data logging, validation, and control during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service calculates distance metrics between simulated and measured trajectories; thresholds determine validity, with notifications upon breach."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data exchange between physical sensors (Arduino) and digital twin services; Python-based interface for controller communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital twin components (database, MQTT broker, dashboard) containerized via Docker Compose; gantrylib Python module deployed on personal computer."
]
